## What

One or two sentences on what this PR changes.

## Why

What problem does it solve. Link issues with `Fixes #123` when applicable.

## How it was tested

Note the distro if you ran it on a real machine. If you changed the TUI, drop a
screenshot or a short asciicast.

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` passes (or `bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] No em dashes added (use commas, periods, colons)
- [ ] No AI / Claude / Anthropic attribution in commits or prose
- [ ] Screenshots attached for TUI changes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or flags changed
- [ ] New code has tests, or there is a good reason it does not
